query: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool repair status latest news June July 2026, algae paint peeling, is the pool fully repaired, lawsuit status
answer:
I've completed comprehensive research on the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool. Here's the summary:

## Key Findings (as of July 10, 2026)

**Is the pool fully repaired? NO.** The pool is being drained for the **second time in three months** (draining began ~July 6, 2026, after July 4 fireworks) to fix problems that emerged immediately after the June 2026 renovation.

**Algae:** Bloomed within a day of refilling in early June. Response included vacuuming, a $1.7M ozone nanobubbler system, and dumping gallons of hydrogen peroxide.

**Peeling paint:** The "American Flag Blue" polyurea coating began peeling off around June 18–19, 2026 — just days after completion. The firm that did the 2012 renovation had declined this project as "unfeasible."

**Lawsuit status: ONGOING.** The Cultural Landscape Foundation (TCLF v. DOI, 26-cv-1593, DDC), filed May 11, 2026, alleges violations of the National Historic Preservation Act (Section 106) and NEPA for skipping mandatory review. The resurfacing was completed before the court ruled on the injunction, but the case continues. TCLF has since sought expedited review.

**Vandalism claims (disputed):** Trump/Burgum allege "gashes" in the lining; 18 police reports, 7 arrests. NYT found two 171-foot foam cuts but no evidence of cause.

**Costs:** Escalated from Trump's initial ~$1.5M claim to $14–15M+, with no-bid contracts and a new long-term maintenance contract being procured (bids due July 8, work starting August 2026).

The complete report and structured data have been delivered.

sources.title: Reflecting Pool being drained – again – as Trump administration tries once more to fix landmark
sources.snippet: Crews began draining the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on Sunday, according to Interior Secretary Doug Burgum, for the second time in three months.

sources.title: A new plan to keep the Reflecting Pool clean – including annual purge of 'nasty' muck
sources.snippet: DOI soliciting bids for long-term maintenance; cost has ballooned to more than $14 million; $1.7M ozone nanobubbler installed.

sources.title: Park Service will drain, repair Reflecting Pool after July Fourth, court filing says
sources.snippet: NPS court filing detailing plans to drain after July 4, vandalism allegations, and ongoing lawsuit; 18 police reports, 7 arrests.

sources.title: Some of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool liner appears to be falling apart
sources.snippet: 'American flag blue' coating peeling away; cost more than $15 million; hydrogen peroxide and nanobubbler deployed against algae.

sources.title: Beautification Out of the (American Flag) Blue: The Lawsuit That Attempted to Halt the Reflecting Pool Makeover
sources.snippet: Detailed legal analysis: TCLF filed May 11, 2026; NHPA Section 106 basis; resurfacing completed before ruling; lawsuit ongoing.

sources.title: Algae clouded Trump's vision for the Reflecting Pool. But scientists aren't surprised
sources.snippet: Algae overtook the newly renovated pool; scientists not surprised given the design and conditions.

sources.title: Blue Paint Seen Peeling Off From Bottom Of Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool (Photos)
sources.snippet: Chunks of peeled blue paint spotted days after $14.2M renovation; dark blue flaps at bottom and floating on surface.

sources.title: Nonprofit sues the federal government over plans to paint Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool blue
sources.snippet: The Cultural Landscape Foundation sued DOI over the blue repainting plan.

sources.title: Trump's blue repainting of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool draws lawsuit and questions about cost
sources.snippet: TCLF asked a federal judge to halt the blue painting, arguing violations of federal review laws.

sources.title: Nonprofit Argues Reflecting Pool Damage Merits Faster Review
sources.snippet: TCLF asked judge to speed up review, citing algae and peeling coating as foreseeable result of skipping review.

sources.title: Exclusive: Firm that worked on past Reflecting Pool renovation passed on Trump project after deeming it 'unfeasible'
sources.snippet: Prior renovation firm declined the 2026 project, balking at the July 4 deadline and blue-bottom requirement.

sources.title: Trump ups Reflecting Pool renovation projections to 'less than $20 million' amid court fight
sources.snippet: Trump said cost will be 'less than $20 million'; federal judge heard arguments May 21.

sources.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool being drained again as fencing surrounds landmark
sources.snippet: Crews started draining the pool for the second time in three months; fencing installed.

sources.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool
sources.snippet: In 2026 the pool was resurfaced at Trump's order with a blue polyurea coating and a nanobubbler filtration system was added.
